fragments.title: Token efficiency baseline
content: Keep static policy in stable instructions or skills, not repeated per-turn text.
Default to concise answers and targeted reads before broad exploration.
Use subagents or isolated search summaries for wide repo exploration.
Keep static context first and dynamic context last in reusable prompt packets.
Save a compact snapshot before a session or model switch.
This cache is local resume state, not provider-side KV cache resurrection.

fragments.title: Project static frame
content: Summarize the repository's purpose, platform, and primary engineering boundary in 3 to 5 lines.
Record only stable project facts that should survive across session resets and model switches.
Prefer architecture boundaries, artifact locations, and workflow rules over volatile run state.
Replace this fragment in each consuming repository with project-specific content before regular use.
